data.title: Cisive obtains PBSA-BSOAP accreditation after audit. Leading provider of background screening services.
data.description: In Easton, Maryland on January 15, 2026, Cisive, a prominent company specializing in technology-based background screening, workforce risk management, and data services, has confirmed the successful conclusion of its accreditation audit. This achievement ensures the company's compliance with necessary standards and regulations.

data.title: ETHZilla (Nasdaq: ETHZ) to join Susquehanna's 15th Annual Tech Conference, focusing on real-world asset tokenization.
data.description: Today, in Palm Beach, Florida, ETHZilla Corporation (Nasdaq: ETHZ) revealed plans to construct institutional-grade infrastructure for real-world asset tokenization. John Saunders, CFO, and John Kristoff, SVP, will lead this initiative.

data.title: MetaMask expands support to Tron after adding Bitcoin and Solana. It now supports multiple chains, moving beyond Ethereum.
data.description: MetaMask has been broadening its horizons beyond Ethereum, with the addition of Tron support on Thursday. This move comes after the announcement last month of MetaMask's support for Bitcoin. The platform's expansion now includes a total of three chains - Ethereum, Bitcoin, and Tron. These developments signal MetaMask's strategic growth, catering to the diverse needs of users.

data.title: FourLeaf Federal Credit Union named to 2025 Fortune Best Workplaces for Women list in Small & Medium category.
data.description: Located in Bethpage, New York, on January 15, 2026, FourLeaf Federal Credit Union revealed its inclusion in the 2025 Fortune Best Workplaces for Women list under the Small & Medium category. A recognition bestowed by Great Place To Work® and Fortune magazine, the credit union stands proud of this achievement.

data.title: Verve Cloud named Great Place to Work-certified for 7th year in a row. Specializes in UCaaS & Broadband for SMB market.
data.description: A company based in San Diego, Verve Cloud, Inc., disclosed on January 15, 2026, that they are a leading provider of cloud services across the nation. They focus on offering UCaaS (Unified Communications as a Service) and Broadband solutions tailored for small to medium-sized businesses ("SMBs"). Verve Cloud, Inc. was acknowledged as a great workplace for its employees.

data.title: Global reusable beverage bottles and crates market to hit $2,341.4 million by 2036, from $980.0 million in 2026, fueled by EU PPWR targets and 9.1% CAGR.
data.description: Delaware's city of Newark is witnessing significant changes in the reusable beverage bottles and crates market, with a current value of USD 980.0 million as of January 15, 2026. Forecasts suggest this industry will experience remarkable growth, expected to reach USD 2,341.4 million by 2036, more than doubling in value during this transformative decade.

data.title: Software-Defined Networking Market projected to hit $82.59 billion by 2030, growing at 18.2% CAGR, up from $35.74 billion in 2025.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida as of January 15, 2026, research firm MarketsandMarkets™ predicts that the Software-Defined Networking Market will grow significantly, with projections indicating a rise to USD 82.59 billion by 2030 from USD 35.74 billion in 2025. This expansion is expected to occur at a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 18.2% between 2025 and 2030. The comprehensive research includes analysis across 292 market data Tables and 54 Figures.

data.title: Amir Malayery appointed as Managing Director at Insight Partners to lead secondaries strategy, showcasing firm's commitment.
data.description: A prominent global software investor, Insight Partners, revealed today that Amir Malayery has been appointed as a Managing Director on Jan 15, 2026. In this role, Malayery will spearhead Insight's secondaries strategy, showcasing the firm's dedication to this area. This strategic move underlines Insight Partners' emphasis on expanding its team to enhance its operations and investment expertise.

data.title: Hunt Brothers Pizza brings back Buffalo Chicken Pizza after 17 years, the most popular LTO, #1 in convenience stores.
data.description: A popular company in Nashville, Tennessee is marking 17 years since the launch of its most successful limited-time offer (LTO) by bringing it back this winter. Hunt Brothers® Pizza, leading the way as the top branded pizza program in convenience stores, revealed the comeback of the Buffalo Chicken Pizza.

data.title: MongoDB introduces Voyage4 models for AI applications, serving customers like Tavily and TinyFish. SAN FRANCISCO, Jan 15, 2026 /PRNewswire - MongoDB, Inc. (NASDAQ:MDB) expands AI capabilities at MongoDB.local.
data.description: Tavily and TinyFish are some of the many clients utilizing MongoDB to develop and expand AI-driven features and workloads. On January 15, 2026, MongoDB, Inc. (NASDAQ: MDB) unveiled a significant enhancement in its AI functionalities during MongoDB.local San Francisco, marking a groundbreaking milestone in the industry.

data.title: Leviton names Brad McDowell as VP of global accounts and European markets as Bruno Filio retires.
data.description: Experienced industry professional Brad McDowell has been promoted to vice president overseeing global accounts and European markets, following the retirement of Leviton executive Bruno Filio. The announcement was made on Jan. 15, 2026 from Leviton's headquarters in Melville, New York. This shift marks a significant change in the company's global sales strategy, with McDowell taking on a key role in managing international markets.

data.title: ICW Group expands ICW Specialty with ART, appoints Travis Murnan. Murnan leads new capability, enhancing business unit.
data.description: In San Diego on January 15, 2026, ICW Group unveiled the growth of its ICW Specialty division by introducing Alternative Risk Transfer (ART) solutions and appointing Travis Murnan as the Head of Alternative Risk Transfer. The incorporation of ART signifies an ongoing expansion effort within the company.

data.title: New study reveals digital payments contribute $350B to U.S. economy annually, creating 2M jobs & unleashing consumer benefits.
data.description: A recent report has highlighted the significant impact of digital payments on the U.S. economy. According to the report, digital payments contribute over $350 billion to the annual economic output of the United States, which in turn supports over 2 million jobs. Additionally, digital payments have been instrumental in unlocking billions more in growth, productivity, and entrepreneurship within the country.

data.title: Glenfarne in Texas LNG project fully subscribed with RWE, finalizing all announced agreements.
data.description: In Houston, it was announced that Texas LNG, a company under Glenfarne Group, has secured a binding offtake agreement with RWE. This agreement marks the completion of converting all previously disclosed Heads of Agreement into official contracts.
